description_long: This is a single-story residential house surrounded by a low boundary wall and landscaped with several trees and shrubs. The structure features a flat roof and a spacious driveway leading to a garage area, with the main entrance set back from the street. The exterior walls are light-colored, and the windows are arranged in a regular, symmetrical pattern along the facade. The property includes a paved walkway, a small garden area, and a backyard space visible from the rear. The house appears to have multiple rooms, with large windows providing ample natural light. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, light exterior walls, symmetrical windows, and landscaped surroundings including a driveway and garden.
description_view_0: Side view showing the flat roof, boundary wall, and landscaped garden with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the driveway, main entrance, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the garage area and additional landscaping.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the backyard, garden, and rear-facing windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a paved approach, no porch, and minimal decorative elements.
